changes.text: Radar OCR detector with calibration dialog (disabled by default)
Waypoint copy button with icon, tooltip, and click-to-copy feedback in wiki detail and overlay
Skills dashboard chart baselines no longer drop accumulated live gains on periodic refresh
Dashboard globals feed filters out historical events and auto-scrolls to newest
'Hide overcapped' unchecked by default in loadout manager
API requests now identify as NexusClient/{version} instead of default Python user-agent
Map search result navigation no longer crashes with AttributeError when opening the Maps page
Mob globals panel now refreshes correctly when switching between mob pages in-place
Removed Gill Sans fallback fonts from client and web UI font stacks
New 'Enable Video Capture' setting separates capture infrastructure from clipping — recording now works independently without enabling the clip replay buffer
'Enable Clipping (Replay Buffering)' replaces the old clip toggle — controls only the clip button, hotkey, auto-clip on global, and OBS replay buffer management
Webcam no longer activates at capture startup when only recording is enabled — pre-warmed only when the clip buffer is on or 'Keep camera active' is set
Recording bar clip button shows a steady blue glow when the buffer is active, pulsing only during clip encoding
Recording bar record and clip buttons now show a visually disabled state when their respective features are turned off
Map overlay search results snap back to the previously viewed location when the cursor leaves a hovered result
Map overlay search results box height is clamped to available window space on small screens
Map overlay Closest Teleporter label uses text ellipsis to prevent widening the detail panel
Map overlay mob maturity names use a compact two-line ellipsis layout to prevent the panel from widening
Gallery thumbnails retain loaded images across month switches and resizes — no more 'Loading...' flash when revisiting a month
Search results now navigate to planet maps when a Map type result is selected
Gallery thumbnails now load progressively — placeholders appear immediately while images decode in the background
Gallery reload no longer stacks signal handlers — previous loader is cancelled and disconnected before starting a new one
Recording audio no longer drifts on dropped frames — the last available frame is repeated to fill gaps, keeping video duration exactly in sync with audio
Recording frame queue increased from 3 to 10 to reduce unnecessary drops during brief encoding hiccups
Encoding priority setting: choose Normal, Below Normal (recommended), or Idle — the OS automatically backs off encoding when the game needs CPU, no polling required
Gallery now shows global value and mob name (e.g. '250 PED - Leviathan Stalker') instead of the filename for clips and screenshots linked to a global
Reduced RAM usage by ~30 MB: shared memory cache eliminates duplicate data across wiki, loadout, and calculator
Wiki warmup only stores data for visited categories instead of all 32 endpoints
Skills sync runs in background during startup instead of blocking the splash screen
Exchange detail caches use LRU eviction (max 100 entries) to bound memory
Wiki view cache limited to 10 most-recently visited categories
Ingestion upload buffers bounded to prevent unbounded memory growth on network issues
OCR debug images only saved when trace logging is active
FFmpeg no longer opens a visible console window in release builds
Removed first-launch capture backend choice dialog — defaults to auto detection
Screenshot capture: take screenshots with a hotkey, with optional blur regions and custom backgrounds
Video clip recording: record gameplay clips with game audio and microphone
Webcam overlay on recordings with chroma key (green screen) support
Microphone audio filters: noise suppression, noise gate, and compressor with live preview
Gallery page for browsing, replaying, and managing your screenshots and clips
Recording bar overlay with live timer, pause/resume, and status indicators
Configurable screenshot and clip output folders with daily subfolders
Per-tier market price filtering in wiki, overlay, and detail views
Improved recording stability and thread safety
Audio capture now follows default device changes automatically
Required components (media libraries, FFmpeg, noise models) are all downloaded upfront before recording
Reduced memory usage during long recordings
BitBlt capture backend: flicker-free window capture without yellow border
New capture backend priority: WGC (borderless) > BitBlt > PrintWindow
Capture method dialog now shown to all users on update with clearer descriptions
Capture backend dialog no longer incorrectly shown on Windows 11
Borderless WGC probe now actually tests the border setting instead of failing on window lookup
Mob globals: see global loot events for any mob — recent events, top looters, and time period filters
Skill picker: quickly choose skills or professions to chart by category, preset, or your top gains
Toggle individual goals on/off in the dashboard chart using the eye icon
Drag table column edges to resize them
Borderless window capture for smoother screen reading
First-launch dialog helps you pick the best screen capture method for your system
Overlays no longer flash white on startup
Skills page opens faster
More accurate market price readings from the in-game window
Hotkeys no longer stop working after extended use
No more brief freeze when first pressing a hotkey
More reliable game window detection
Skill updates save faster and no longer cause brief lag
App no longer hangs when closing
Target lock and player status detection are now opt-in (off by default in settings)
Market price overlay now shows correct data for all materials
Market prices visible without logging in
Market prices refresh automatically every 5 minutes
Reduced disk space used by temporary files
Mission reorder arrows now stay within the same group
Skill goals: set point or profession-level targets with progress bars and rank shortcuts
Skill picker dialog: choose skills by category, profession preset, or top-gaining for custom charts
Multi-line skill charts: interactive timeseries with hover crosshair, legend, and cumulative mode
Goal dialog for creating, editing, and tracking skill and profession targets
Market price OCR: detect and scan in-game market price windows for item name, tier, markup, and sales data
Market price confidence scoring for OCR quality filtering
Market price display: wiki detail sections and overlay tab showing markup/sales per period with price history charts
Inventory markup source selector: choose between In-Game prices and Exchange WAP, with period fallback (Daily→Weekly→Monthly→Yearly→Decade)
Market price preliminary snapshots: price data available immediately after ingestion instead of waiting for next hour
Market price fraud detection with outlier scoring and admin alerts
Gear picker dialog: searchable, sortable table for browsing weapons, armor, healing tools, and accessories
Loadout sets: manage multiple weapon, armor, healing, and accessory sets within a single loadout
Loadout comparison widget: side-by-side stat comparison with set permutations and delta mode
Loadout sharing and import/export with share codes
Exchange overlay redesigned with tabbed layout (browse, favorites, orders, inventory, trades)
Background exchange cache population for faster startup without blocking the UI
Inventory history dialog: view past imports and track portfolio value over time
Inventory import improvements: TSV/JSON parsing, gender alias generation, diff preview
Tracker page charts: multi-line timeseries visualization for tracked statistics
Subprocess-based loading splash: smooth animation that never freezes during heavy page construction
Freeze detector: watchdog that logs main-thread stalls >0.5s with stack traces for diagnostics
OCR trace logging system for font matching and detection debugging
Expanded font matcher with updated market text STPK templates
FuzzyLineEdit popup widgets created lazily, eliminating ~15 unnecessary QListWidget allocations at page init
Loadout dropdown name extraction and sorting moved to background thread
All pages prewarmed before main window is shown, so first tab click is always instant
Loading splash appears on the same monitor as the main window
Exchange overlay layout and interaction improvements
Profile overlay display refinements
Notification center styling and layout fixes
Ingestion uploader reliability improvements
Globals page mob name resolution fix
Fixed stale markup_90d column references (renamed to markup_365d in migration 095)
Sitemap generation: added Strongbox type and null-safe item type lookup
Tracker page: track daily missions with cooldown countdowns and completion status
Tracker page: view upcoming and past in-game events from the API
Tracker notifications: grouped alerts when tracked missions become ready
Local-first skill sync: skill values persist locally with dirty tracking and offline support
Manual skill corrections with persistent history snapshots
Configurable screenshot capture backend: Windows Game Capture (WGC) or GDI fallback
Proactive rate limit detection to prevent API throttling on ingestion endpoints
Event fetching from frontend API with in-memory TTL cache
Protected API endpoints no longer fire network requests when user is logged out
Capture backend config changes now propagate to active OCR pipeline
Improved skill points column detection reliability in OCR scanner
Template-relative ROI system: skill scan regions defined as pixel offsets from the SKILLS template, replacing ratio-based layout
Alpha mask template matching for SKILLS label (ignores background pixels)
Shared frame cache: all OCR detectors reuse the same PrintWindow capture per frame
Skills template debug overlay showing match box, ROI regions, column cells, and bar regions
Bar offset ROI for precise progress bar positioning in skill scan
Multi-monitor overlay support with physical pixel HWND sizing for high-DPI screens
Per-monitor DPI awareness (PER_MONITOR_AWARE_V2) for correct overlay placement
F2 hotkey to toggle all overlay widgets on/off
Row pitch support in ROI config (gap between row starts vs content height)
Faulthandler no longer shares log file handle, preventing log rotation lock on Windows
Null coordinate crash in map canvas location rendering
Skill scan window tracking now uses full template match every cycle for reliable movement detection
Reverted overlay logo toggle that broke search bar focus and keyboard input
Skill gain tracking from chat log with compact database storage
Skills tab shows accumulated gains since last scan or import
Live skill gain updates while Skills tab is open
Sort skills by gain to see most-trained skills first
Loadout compare: crit chance and crit damage columns (client and website)
Loadout compare: configurable column visibility via Columns menu
Loadout compare: chunked evaluation to reduce UI lag
Configurable overlay hotkeys with per-key editing in settings
Global hotkeys enable/disable toggle and reset-to-defaults
OAuth login shows descriptive error messages instead of silent failures
Re-login splash when background token refresh detects expired session
Main window opens on the same monitor as the splash screen
Crash: 'database is locked' during chat log catchup with concurrent writes
Loadout scope/sight/matrix efficiency showing N/A when attachment has no decay cost
Loadout picker link button clipped by narrow column
Exchange overlay resize grip hidden behind content
Crit chance and crit damage values now display correctly in compare tables
Compare button height matches other toolbar buttons
Exchange price snapshots clamped to numeric column limit
Disabled market price OCR detector (not yet functional)
Settings auto-save in realtime (no more Save button)
Overlay opacity updates live as you drag the slider
Profile globals auto-refresh with recent activity feed
Total/Best toggle for top hunting, mining, and crafting globals
Click items in profile globals to open exchange orderbook
Trade chat keyword filtering with item search, regex, and planet filters
Dashboard feed filters (min global value, blocked types, trade blocklist/blacklist)
Settings search bar with section filtering and text highlighting
Self-notification filtering (suppress own globals and trade messages)
Exchange overlay drag from sidebar and double-click minify/restore
Dashboard ticker headers with settings and notification shortcuts
Weapon calculator now works in production builds (py-mini-racer library fix)
Overlays no longer steal window focus from the game
Profile overlay hover styling now works correctly
Crash guard for settings page initialization failures
Persistent error logging to ~/.entropia-nexus/client.log (1-hour rolling, 256KB cap)
C-level crash tracebacks now captured via faulthandler
Notification and toast text eliding uses proper width calculations
Trade cooldown changed from seconds to minutes for better UX
Notification center panel border separation from background content
OCR skill window detection timeout demoted to debug level
Weapon calculator failing to load data in production builds
Data cache and JS bridge paths now resolve correctly in PyInstaller bundles
Linux support (X11 and Wayland) via platform abstraction layer
Wayland compositor support improvements (KDE, Sway, Hyprland focus control)
Pet skills redesigned as card grid layout
OAuth login reliability on Linux (favicon race, port handling, keyring fallback)
App shutdown reliability (parallel cleanup, signal handling)
Map overlay can now be dragged from sidebar and footer
Skill and profession weights displayed as percentage instead of raw value
Scroll behavior in wiki detail descriptions
Updater compatibility for 0.1.0 clients (legacy URL redirect)
Update dialog now shows download progress (file count and current file)
Critical updater failures notify the user with manual download instructions
Changelog 'What's new' section now correctly shows entries for the latest version
Exchange favourites tab with folder management
Quick buy/sell dialog — double-click orders in the orderbook
Double-click own orders to edit
Exchange trade request notifications
Exchange markup values not showing for many items
ArmorSet badge in exchange order names
OCR library missing from build
Initial release
